items.title:
Analyze 50 competitors in just 5 minutes ⚡️

Start by asking ChatGPT to generate a CSV of competitor websites in your industry.

Then upload it to Mino, and let the AI agent do the heavy lifting.

It scans every site in parallel, extracts pricing and feature tables, and structures everything cleanly.
No skipped pages. No hallucinations. Just real data, at scale.

This is where tools like ChatGPT struggle. And where Mino shines.

Follow for more AI workflows like this.

#aicompetitors #marketresearch #aiautomation #saastools #productivity

It enables users to analyze competitors' traffic sources, audience demographics, engagement, keyword strategies and 
more, allowing for in-depth, side-by-side comparisons!
